question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from patient samples?
explain: The paper discusses genotypic resistance testing performed on HIV-infected children who experienced failure of NNRTI-based therapy. This indicates that HIV sequences from patient samples were analyzed to determine resistance mutations.
sentences: "We carried out a multicentre retrospective study of genotyping tests performed for all HIV-infected children at eight paediatric centres in Thailand who experienced failure of NNRTI therapy at a time when virological monitoring was not routinely available."; "Genotypic resistance testing was recommended for plasma HIV RNA >1000 copies/mL, which has been provided free of charge under the national programme since 2005."; "Genotypic resistance testing was performed using the TruGene HIV-1 Genotyping system (Visible Genetics, Inc., Toronto, Canada) at five sites, the ViroSeq HIV-1 Genotyping System (Celera Diagnostics, Alameda, CA) at one site, and an in-house method using Stanford and IAS databases at two sites."

question: Which drug classes were received by individuals in the study before sample sequencing?
answer: NRTI (Nucleoside Reverse Transcriptase Inhibitor), NNRTI (Non-Nucleoside Reverse Transcriptase Inhibitor)
explain: The study focuses on children who experienced failure of NNRTI-based therapy, which includes both NRTIs and NNRTIs as part of the treatment regimen.
sentences: "The aim of the study was to assess the prevalence, predictors and patterns of genotypic resistance mutations in children after failure of World Health Organization-recommended initial nonnucleoside reverse transcriptase inhibitor (NNRTI)-based treatment regimens."; "The nucleoside reverse transcriptase inhibitor (NRTI) resistance mutations found were as follows: 85% of the children had M184V/I, 23% had at least four thymidine analogue mutations, 12% had the Q151M complex, 5% had K65R, and 1% had the 69 insertion."; "Ninety-eight per cent of the children had at least one NNRTI resistance mutation, and 48% had etravirine mutation-weighted scores ≥4."

question: Which drugs were received by individuals in the study before sample sequencing?
explain: The study mentions that the children received NNRTI-based ART regimens containing either nevirapine or efavirenz, and the NRTI backbones included zidovudine plus lamivudine or stavudine plus lamivudine.
sentences: "For this HIV drug resistance pattern study, the inclusion criteria were HIV infection, age <18 years, receipt of an NNRTI-based ART regimen containing either nevirapine or efavirenz, treatment failure on first-line therapy, and had genotypic resistance testing within 12 months prior to switching to a second-line regimen."; "Children who had a history of mono or dual NRTI therapy before starting NNRTI-based ART, or who received an NRTI backbone other than zidovudine plus lamivudine or stavudine plus lamivudine, were excluded from the study."
